note: AI Engine page advanced to v0.21.0 with the new M21 (Canonical Mission Engine + AI Scientist Swarm) section. Closes the 'criterion' gap: every hypothesis now runs through (a) a per-project canonical-objectives scorer (8 materials / 6 geaspirit / 2 geadeep / 2 useful_compute objectives with align_keywords + kill_criteria + proxies), (b) a six-role AI scientist swarm — Discoverer / Skeptic / Engineer / Economist / Validator / Historian — and (c) a contradiction-to-discovery loop that converts disagreements into opportunity records. Canonical memory persists cycle summaries and per-hypothesis records (gated by can_update_memory; only materials writes). Three new capability gates added (can_generate_hypothesis, can_critique_hypothesis, can_rank_mission_alignment) — true for materials/geaspirit/useful_compute only; false elsewhere. The canonical gate set is now fourteen wide; can_execute_experiment / can_run_dft / can_publish / can_touch_consensus all remain false for every project. Tests 1,272 / 1,272 green. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R).
